title: Fix functions/tasks following class definition inside module

features.name: class_with_function_same_name_inside_module
features.description: Code should include a class with a function definition inside a module, where an identically-named function also exists outside the class at module scope

features.name: parameterized_class_constructor_call_after_definition
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class instantiation with constructor call immediately following the class definition inside a module
